Reliable Garage Door Experts in Las Vegas

Trust Summit Garage Door for fast, friendly service. We keep your home secure in Henderson, North Las Vegas, and Summerlin.

Your Local Garage Door Specialists

Since 2012, Summit Garage Door has been serving Southern Nevada with honest, dependable garage door services. Founded by a Las Vegas native, we understand how the desert climate affects your garage door system.

Our Garage Door Services

Professional garage door solutions tailored to your needs.

Garage Door Repair

Fast fixes for broken springs, off-track doors, and malfunctioning openers.

Learn More →

Garage Door Installation

Professional installation of new residential and commercial garage doors.

Learn More →

Garage Door Maintenance

Preventative care to extend your garage door's life in desert conditions.

Learn More →

Garage Door Opener Repair

Fix malfunctioning openers with same-day service across the valley.

Learn More →

Garage Door Spring Replacement

Specialized service for broken torsion and extension springs.

Learn More →

Garage Door Insulation

Reduce energy costs by insulating your garage door.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our garage door services.

Why did my garage door spring break so soon?

Las Vegas' 115°F summers cause metal fatigue 3x faster than moderate climates. We install springs with higher cycle ratings specifically for our weather.

Can you repair my 1980s garage door?

Yes—we specialize in maintaining older systems common in original Las Vegas neighborhoods. Many just need updated rollers and lubrication.

Reviews From Our Garage Door Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"When my spring snapped at 7 AM, Summit had a tech here by noon. He explained why Las Vegas heat wears them out faster and installed a heavy-duty model. Quiet operation ever since!"

Martha R. Spring replacement

"Our Summerlin HOA approved their suggested contemporary door on first submission. Installation crew worked around our landscaping and left zero mess. Door stays cool even in August heat."

James T. New door installation

"Fixed our 15-year-old opener that three other companies said needed replacing. Just needed new logic board and sensors cleaned. Honest service—will call them first from now on."

Lisa K. Opener repair
